curation_notes: Patch commit (PR #7882) moves the acl plugin entry after the rewrite plugin entry in plugin.cfg. Only 1 non-test source file changed. The vulnerability class race-condition (TOCTOU) matches the pre-assigned CWE-367 and the advisory description which explicitly names the TOCTOU pattern. Location is plugin.cfg since the execution order defined there is the root cause. No sibling files share this pattern.
